hero.description: Ambra is a complete SaaS platform for warehouse and inventory management. Warehouse system, product tracking, QR locations — all in one place.

stats.eyebrow: Trusted by hundreds of companies in Poland

features.title: Everything your warehouse needs
features.description: From QR code scanning to advanced analytics. One platform, zero compromises.
features.feat1Desc: Add, edit and categorise products with variants, images and purchase data.
features.feat2Desc: 3-level hierarchical location tree with QR codes for every shelf and zone.
features.feat3Desc: 31 SAP-compatible movement types: GR, GI, ST, IA, KP, KN, INV.
features.feat4Desc: Audit scheduling and history with automatic discrepancy detection.
features.feat5Desc: Generate QR/EAN/Code128 labels. Export to PDF. Scan with your phone.
features.feat6Desc: Manage suppliers, register deliveries, full purchase history.

howItWorks.title: Three steps to go live
howItWorks.description: From registration to your first warehouse movement — in less than a day.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Create your organisation, add branches and invite your team. Configure roles and permissions in minutes.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Define your warehouse structure, add products with variants and assign them to locations. Print QR labels.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Record receipts, issues and transfers. Monitor stock, plan audits, analyse reports.

parallax.description: Every pallet, every parcel, every move — visible in real time.

stickyText.text: Your warehouse is not just a place. It is a system. It is the heartbeat of your business. Ambra keeps it beating steady.

horizontalScroll.panel1Desc: Scan QR and barcode with your phone.
horizontalScroll.panel3Desc: Reports and trends ready in seconds.

staggerCards.card1Desc: Receiving goods from supplier with invoice.
staggerCards.card2Desc: Issuing goods to customer with document.

bento.eyebrow: Hover — the light follows your cursor
bento.cell1Desc: All branches, suppliers and sales channels in one view.

svgPath.eyebrow: We connect every point in your warehouse
svgPath.description: Animated paths appear as they enter the viewport.

cardStack.description: Cards swap in the stack with entrance / exit animation.

testimonials.title: Polish operators on Ambra
testimonials.t1Quote: Ambra revolutionised how we manage our warehouse. We save several hours a day on inventory processes.
testimonials.t2Quote: Thanks to Ambra we increased inventory accuracy to 98%. The QR scanning feature is invaluable in our daily work.
testimonials.t3Quote: Ambra's intuitive design lets us onboard new staff quickly. Reports and analytics help us optimise orders.

cta.title: Ready for a revolution in warehouse management?
cta.description: Join hundreds of companies already managing their inventory with Ambra. 14 days free, no credit card.

selection.selectAllRowsAria: Select all rows on this page

page.title: DataView Demo
page.description: Generic master-detail workspace. URL-driven state via nuqs, TanStack Query for caching, and Framer Motion for the detail transition.

deleteDialog.title: Delete location?
deleteDialog.description: <name></name> will be soft-deleted. Any child locations will become root-level locations.

help.inheritGroupColor: Use the selected group's color for this location.
help.mapping: Physical metadata and mapping role used by the dual-projection map viewer.
help.allowTopStorage: Allow storage above the nominal top of this unit.
help.allowTopStorageTopDown: Enable this when stock may be placed on top of the rack or cabinet.
help.layoutRoot: This is the root map location. Its width and length define the layout canvas for the whole warehouse or room.
help.elevationLevel: Higher elevation levels render above lower ones in the top-down map view.
help.inheritTopDownParentColor: Use the selected container or parent location color for this top-down unit.
help.inheritParentColor: Use the selected parent unit's color for this front segment.
help.inheritTopStorageParentColor: Use the selected top-down unit's color for this top storage segment.
help.logicalRole: This is a container location. It stores child locations and codes, but is not placed directly on the map and does not change the map-projection hierarchy.
help.topDownParent: Top-down units must belong directly to a root map location.
help.frontSegmentParent: Front segments must belong directly to a top-down unit.
help.topStorageParent: Top storage segments must belong directly to a top-down unit with top storage enabled.
help.parentHeightUnknown: Parent height is not specified yet.
help.frontSegmentHeightHint: This segment can use up to {available} m of the parent's {max} m height.
help.frontSegmentHeightRequired: Front segments require an explicit height.
help.frontSegmentHeightExceeded: Segment height exceeds the available parent height ({available} m of {max} m).
help.topStorageHeightHint: Top storage sits above the rack body, so its height is not limited by the parent's front-segment stack.
help.topStorageHeightRequired: Top storage segments require an explicit height.
help.topStorageHeightExceeded: Top storage height exceeds the available parent height ({available} m of {max} m).

validation.codeTooLong: Code must be 20 characters or fewer.
validation.codeInvalid: Code may only contain letters, numbers, forward slashes, hyphens, and underscores.
